records.ety: [L. Helotes, Hilotae, pl., fr. Gr. E'e`lws and E'elw`ths a bondman or serf of the Spartans; so named from 'Elos, a town of Laconia, whose inhabitants were enslaved; or perh. akin to e`lei^n to take, conquer, used as 2d aor. of <?/.]

defs: A slave in ancient Sparta; a Spartan serf; hence, a slave or serf.
quotes: Those unfortunates, the Helots of mankind, more or less numerous in every community.
